name: prucs-plugins
description: Official Claude Code plugin marketplace by the prucs-plugins org

plugins.name: gameplay-editor
plugins.description: Transform long gameplay recordings into highlight reels and short-form clips using audio analysis and browser-based clip curation

plugins.name: coconuti
plugins.description: AI-powered investment research, prediction, and portfolio management with multi-agent DAG pipeline architecture and intelligent delegation framework

plugins.name: research-mode
plugins.description: Anti-hallucination research mode for Claude Code. Toggle on/off to enforce citation requirements, source grounding, and I don't know behavior.

plugins.name: reddit-business-research
plugins.description: Research what Reddit says about your business, competitors, and industry. Searches posts, analyzes sentiment, and generates actionable reports.

plugins.name: idea-research
plugins.description: Comprehensive business research, market analysis, competitor intelligence, and idea validation with TAM/SAM/SOM, Porter's Five Forces, and SWOT analysis.

plugins.name: project-optimizer
plugins.description: Create project.md (PRD), brand.md (brand guidelines), and CLAUDE.md (technical config) for any project. Interactive workflow with archetype-based branding.
